description_long: This is a blue, single-propeller military airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, featuring prominent U.S. Air Force insignia on both wings and the fuselage. The aircraft has a single-seat, enclosed cockpit positioned towards the front, with a clear canopy and a visible antenna mast behind it. The propeller has three blades with yellow tips, and the landing gear is configured in a taildragger style, with the main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all painted blue with white markings. The surface appears metallic with a slightly matte finish, and the airplane is detailed with panel lines, rivets, and military markings. The overall design suggests a World War II-era fighter aircraft, likely constructed primarily from metal alloys.
description: A blue, single-propeller military fighter airplane with elliptical wings, U.S. Air Force insignia, and a single-seat enclosed cockpit. The aircraft features a taildragger landing gear and a streamlined, metallic body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wingspan, three-blade propeller with yellow tips, and the forward-positioned cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuselage profile, wing insignia, and the taildragger landing gear with the tail wheel visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, both wing insignias, and the streamlined shape of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite wing insignia, fuselage markings, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy.
